calendar.matters:
Petition For Removal And Appointment Of Trustee; Petition For Accounting; For Sale Of Property; For Surcharge
Off Calendar Jan-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for Diamond Hunter (Petitioner).

Mr. Jew stated that everyone agreed to striking the provision that authorizes Elizabeth to sell the Madera property, provided a revised order and stated that a stipulation was filed on January 6th. The Court noted that the proposed order does not track the stipulation and stated that the order has three points and the stipulation has four points. Mr. Jew stated that he is not sure that point #4 was needed and that he believes that this revised order addresses everything. The Petition for Removal and Appointment of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petition For Removal And Appointment Of Trustee; Petition For Accounting; For Sale Of Property; For Surcharge
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Continued To Jan-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for Diamond Hunter (Petitioner) and specially appearing for Attorney David Horsnby on behalf of Donald Michael (Respondent).

Mr. Jew stated that the Parties have settled the matter, that the settlement was executed earlier this week, and that they stipulated to Lisa being appointed as the Successor Trustee and to having the Trustee sell the Madera property. The Court stated that there is a problem with that, that it's not consistent with the trust instrument, that there is a process to sell and questions why not follow that process. Mr. Jew stated that he wasn't sure, that he will need to speak with Counsel and requested a two-week continuance. The Petition for Removal and Appointment of Trustee, etc. is continued to January 8, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

Petition For Removal And Appointment Of Trustee; Petition For Accounting; For Sale Of Property; For Surcharge
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Continued To Dec-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Bowles for and with Diamond Hunter.
David Hornsby appeared by telephone for Don Michael (Trustee).

Mr. Bowles stated that they have reached resolution, that Mr. Hornsby's Client has agreed to be removed today, that no accounting will be required, that Mr. Hornsby's Client will revoke his interest in the property from today forward, that what would have been Mr. Michael's interest will go to Ms. Hunter's Attorney's fees and that the property will be distributed equally to the five Sisters. Mr. Bowles also stated that he e-filed a petition for appointment of a new Trustee (Lisa Soloway). The Court noted that it does not have a consent from Ms. Soloway. Discussion was held as to how the parties are going to proceed with the sale of the property, Mr. Hornsby referred to language in the trust regarding the Settlor's position with respect to sale of the property, the issue of having a vacancy in trusteeship and appointing Ms. Soloway as a temporary trustee was raised, Counsel spoke of entering into a stipulation with respect to Mr. Michael not cashing or depositing any checks received from the trust property from today forward, the issue of how rents are to be directed was also raised, etc. The Petition for Removal and Appointment of Trustee, etc. is continued to December 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of settlement.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Removal And Appointment Of Trustee; Petition For Accounting; For Sale Of Property; For Surcharge
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Continued To Nov-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Bowles for and with Diamond Hunter (Petitioner).
David Hornsby appeared by telephone for Donald Michael (Trustee).

Mr. Bowles raised the issue of the taxes being paid after the petition was filed with penalties, stated that prior tax years also had to be paid and that two other Beneficiaries have asked for accountings. Mr. Hornsby stated that his Client is willing to do an accounting, that they need to get the accounting together and suggested 120-days. The Court asked Mr. Bowles if he is asking for Court approval of the accountings, or for them to be provided to the Beneficiaries. Mr. Bowles stated that whether Mr. Michael is discharged or not, he expects an accounting from him, that there is a dispute as the when the house on the property burned down, that the taxes are being paid on improved property, that it is a waste of funds, and that he does not think the Court needs to approve the accountings as long as it orders accountings from the day Mr. Michael took over. Ms. Hunter stated that her Mother died on May 9, 2005. The Court orders Mr. Michael to provide accountings for the period of May 9, 2005 through June 30, 2019. The Petition for Removal and Appointment of Trustee, etc. is continued to November 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting is to be exchanged by November 6, 2019. Mr. Bowles is to provide an interim order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Siu. Not reported.
